rewrittenMessage: As the stars filled the sky, you wished me sweet dreams. Little did you know, my sweetest dreams are the ones where you're right beside me.
greeting: Happy Birthday, my love! May all your dreams come true today and always.

rewrittenMessage: You always find me funny, and I love nothing more than being the reason behind your beautiful smile. Your laughter is my favorite melody.
greeting: To the one whose smile brightens my darkest days, I cherish every laugh we share.

originalMessage: Aku rindu kamu setiap hari kayaknya
rewrittenMessage: You told me you missed me every single day. The truth is, my heart aches for you the moment you're not around. Every day feels incomplete without you.
greeting: Distance means so little when someone means so much. I miss you endlessly.

rewrittenMessage: A simple 'Udah sayang' from you carries more warmth and love than a thousand poems. It’s the gentle reassurance that I have you in my corner.
greeting: With you, I feel safe. With you, I am home.

originalMessage: mama ak aja kangen sm ak ham, msa km ga ham 🤭
rewrittenMessage: You teased me about missing you. How could I not? You are the first thought on my mind when I wake up and the last before I sleep.
greeting: I could never stop missing you, not even for a second.

rewrittenMessage: Every time you asked for a picture, it reminded me of how much you cherish just seeing my face. Your love is so pure and undeniable.
greeting: I want to capture every moment with you, frame by frame.

rewrittenMessage: Even when you were busy, you always made sure to let me know. Your thoughtfulness and the sweet 'Bantar ya sayang' never failed to make me smile.
greeting: I’d wait a lifetime for you, my love.

originalMessage: iyaa ak nurut aja dah wkwk. maaf yak udh bikin risih, ak cmn kangen aja sbnrnya pgn liat km.
rewrittenMessage: You apologized for missing me and wanting to see me. You never have to apologize for loving me. Your 'kangen' is a treasure I hold dear.
greeting: Never stop showing me how much you care. I love every bit of it.

rewrittenMessage: Your 'sabar ya sayang' has been my anchor through rough tides. Your patience and love give me the strength to overcome anything.
greeting: Thank you for being my calm in the storm.

rewrittenMessage: There's a gentle magic in the way you say 'Iya sayang'. It's an affirmation of your love, a soft whisper that everything is going to be alright.
greeting: I will always be yours, and you will always be mine.

rewrittenMessage: Even the mundane moments, like just sleeping, become special because they are shared with you. You make the ordinary extraordinary.
greeting: Every moment with you is a moment I treasure.

rewrittenMessage: When you asked 'KANGEN SIAPA?', you already knew the answer. It has always been you. It will always be you. My heart beats only for you.
greeting: It's you. It has always been you.

rewrittenMessage: Your adorable complain about wanting more pictures of me. It's the little things like this that make me fall for you over and over again.
greeting: I promise to give you a lifetime of memories to cherish.

originalMessage: Makasih banyak ya, Sa, udah jujur dan terbuka sama perasaannya.
rewrittenMessage: Our deep conversations, built on honesty and trust, are the foundation of our love. I appreciate your openness more than words can say. We are in this together.
greeting: Thank you for loving me exactly as I am.

originalMessage: Sayang banget itu cantik nya anjir
rewrittenMessage: The way you compliment me, seeing beauty even when I don't see it myself, makes me feel like the most special person in the world.
greeting: You make me feel beautiful inside and out.
